'''''Wrack''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor cruiser]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mynar Devis]], it was equipped with at least three [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], three of ''Wrack''{{'s}} TIE Defenders participated in the [[second Battle of Bilbringi]]. Two of the Defenders and their [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], including Devis, were killed during an assault on a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] command ship.

{{Ship-stub}}
